title: rubus menkei var. distractus
intro: Rubus menkei var. distractus, also known as a variety of the Rubus menkei plant, is a type of flowering raspberry native to Taiwan. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Rubus menkei var. distractus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Rubus menkei var. distractus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be absorbed and utilized by the body.
